name: Skill Samurai
description: STEM enrichment education franchise specialising in coding, robotics, AI, and Singapore Math for children aged 5-17.

programs.name: Mini Coders
programs.description: Introduction to computational thinking through visual block-based coding, simple robotics, and logic puzzles.

programs.name: Junior Coders
programs.description: Intermediate coding with Scratch, Python basics, LEGO robotics, and introduction to Singapore Math problem-solving.

programs.name: Senior Coders
programs.description: Advanced Python, web development, Arduino robotics, AI fundamentals, and competition preparation.

programs.name: Teen Tech
programs.description: Industry-ready skills including full-stack development, machine learning, data science, and portfolio building.

service_lines.name: After-School Coding Classes
service_lines.description: Weekly term-based classes running during the school year.

service_lines.name: Robotics Workshops
service_lines.description: Hands-on robotics sessions using LEGO, Arduino, and custom kits.

service_lines.name: Holiday Camps
service_lines.description: Intensive multi-day programs during school holidays covering themed projects.

service_lines.name: Birthday Parties
service_lines.description: STEM-themed birthday party packages with coding or robotics activities.

service_lines.name: School Workshops
service_lines.description: In-school incursions and workshops delivered during school hours or as extracurricular programs.

service_lines.name: AI Fundamentals
service_lines.description: Dedicated program teaching AI and machine learning concepts appropriate to each age group.

psychographics: Concerned about screen time and wants productive tech engagement
Seeks structured enrichment beyond school curriculum
Active on social media and local community groups
Willing to invest in children's future career readiness

onboarding_checklist.title: Sign Franchise Agreement
onboarding_checklist.description: Execute the franchise agreement and pay the initial franchise fee of $45,000 AUD.

onboarding_checklist.title: Working With Children Check (WWCC)
onboarding_checklist.description: Obtain WWCC clearance or country-equivalent child safety screening for all staff who will interact with children.

onboarding_checklist.title: Curriculum Training Program
onboarding_checklist.description: Complete the 5-day intensive curriculum training at Sydney HQ covering all four age group programs and delivery methodology.

onboarding_checklist.title: Technology Platform Setup
onboarding_checklist.description: Configure POS, booking system, CRM, Samurai Learn LMS, and parent communication portal with HQ support.

onboarding_checklist.title: Centre Fit-Out and Equipment
onboarding_checklist.description: Complete centre fit-out per brand standards including workstations, robotics kits, signage, and child safety compliance.

onboarding_checklist.title: Business Insurance
onboarding_checklist.description: Obtain public liability ($20M minimum), professional indemnity, and contents insurance meeting coverage requirements.

onboarding_checklist.title: Pre-Launch Marketing Plan
onboarding_checklist.description: Develop and submit 90-day launch marketing plan using the marketing playbook template with $15,000 AUD budget.

onboarding_checklist.title: Recruit and Train Instructors
onboarding_checklist.description: Hire minimum 2 qualified instructors and complete onboarding including WWCC, first aid certification, and curriculum delivery training.

onboarding_checklist.title: Establish School Partnerships
onboarding_checklist.description: Approach and establish partnerships with at least 3 local schools for workshops or after-school programs.

onboarding_checklist.title: Soft Launch Event
onboarding_checklist.description: Host a free community open day with trial classes to generate initial enrolments and local awareness.

child_safe_standards.framework: National Principles for Child Safe Organisations

messaging.mission: Empowering the next generation with future-ready skills through hands-on coding, robotics, and AI education.
messaging.vision: A world where every child has the skills and confidence to shape the future through technology.
messaging.elevator_pitch: Skill Samurai is Australia's leading STEM enrichment franchise, teaching kids aged 5-17 to code, build robots, and understand AI through hands-on classes that parents trust and kids love.
value_propositions: Small class sizes with qualified instructors ensure personalised attention for every child.
A structured, globally-recognised curriculum that builds skills progressively from age 5 to 17.
Hands-on, project-based learning that keeps kids engaged while building real-world skills.
A safe, supportive environment where children develop confidence alongside technical ability.
Holiday camps and birthday parties add variety and additional revenue streams for franchisees.
parent_pain_points: My child spends too much time on screens without learning anything useful.
School doesn't teach enough about technology and future careers.
I want structured activities, not just free play.
I need a safe after-school option that's also educational.
